Unveil the essence of Bombay with our exquisite candle. Crafted to transport you, this unique fragrance offers an intriguing interplay of scents:

Top Notes: Bright, zesty orange infuses the air with a welcoming warmth, reminiscent of sun-drenched Mumbai mornings.

Mid Notes: Clean, herbaceous eucalyptus and subtly spicy clove leaf introduce a refreshing, yet comforting layer, echoing the city's diverse aromatic landscape.

Base Notes: A whisper of sea salt grounds the fragrance, evoking the calming presence of the Arabian Sea and Bombay's coastal charm.

This is more than just a scent; it's a sensory journey – delicate yet immense, fleeting yet solid. It’s a fragrance that intricately weaves the history and untold stories of the city into a captivating aroma, offering both evanescence and substance in every flicker. Perfect for creating an ambiance that is both sophisticated and deeply connected to Mumbai's heritage.

Unveil the captivating essence of Mumbai's most cherished season with our exquisite candle. This unique fragrance is crafted to transport you to the heart of a rain-kissed Bombay, capturing the unparalleled aroma of the first monsoon showers.

Top Notes: Bright, uplifting bergamot offers an invigorating burst, reminiscent of the crisp, clean air after a refreshing downpour.

Mid Notes: Earthy patchouli and delicate white florals unfold, echoing the profound, natural scent of rain-sodden earth and the city's lush greenery.

Base Notes: Subtle hints of musk provide a grounding warmth, creating a lingering, faint incense that is both comforting and deeply evocative.

This is more than just a scent; it's a sensory metaphor, connecting you to the city's soul and its historical roots as "Bom Bahia" – the Good Bay. It poetically captures the magic when rain unlocks nature's most aromatic secrets, bringing a moment of profound tranquility and invigoration into your space. Perfect for cultivating an ambiance that is both serene and deeply connected to Mumbai's poetic monsoon spirit.

old_title: COFFEE FLASK SIPPER - GOTHIC ECHOES - VICTORIAN GOTHIC
description:
The perfect companion for your daily adventures with our Bombay Gothic Travel Sipper, meticulously crafted to combine sophisticated style with ultimate functionality. This sleek travel coffee cup is designed to ensure your favorite beverages remain at their ideal temperature, making it your indispensable on-the-go accessory.

Premium Construction: Made from high-quality 304 Food-Grade Stainless Steel, this sipper strikes the perfect balance between robust durability and an elegant keepsake, reflecting Bombay Gothic's commitment to lasting quality.

Optimal Temperature Retention: The advanced stainless steel build ensures your drinks stay hot or cold for extended periods, perfect for busy mornings or leisurely strolls.

Eco-Friendly & Durable: Crafted from an eco-friendly and highly durable material, this sipper is built to last, reducing waste and standing up to daily use.

Convenient Capacity: With a 380 ml capacity, it's perfectly sized for your daily coffee, tea, or any preferred beverage.

On-the-Go Essential: Its design prioritizes portability and ease of use, making it the ideal travel coffee cup for commutes, office, or exploring the city.

This travel sipper isn't just a functional item; it's a stylish statement piece that seamlessly integrates the functionality you need with the artistic heritage Bombay Gothic is known for.
